commands_run: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-breath-band.fk
cd form && ./validate.sh --binary form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-breath-band.fk
cd web && npm ci --allow-git=none && npm run build
failure_reason: Added CHANNEL-BREATH-GIFT and CHANNEL-RESONANCE-RECEIPT to channel.fk, registered offer and attune in the web channel kernel/UI, and proved gift transport, resonance receipt validity, receipt transport, and duplicate payload recognition. Source and binary Form proofs both returned 500; the web channel tests passed 10 tests and the production web build passed.
